zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont於大約1381年出生在蘇格蘭時，他的父親Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont52歲，母親Christina Munn48歲。他於1397年與Anne MacDonald在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1433年享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont于大约1381年出生在苏格兰时，他的父亲Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont52岁，母亲Christina Munn48岁。他于1397年与Anne MacDonald在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1433年享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lamont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: from the medieval personal name Lagman, which is from Old Norse Lǫgmathr, composed of the elements lǫg, plural of lag ‘law’ (from leggja ‘to lay down’), + mathr ‘man’ (genitive manns).
French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', from any of the places called Amont, in Haute-Saône and Haute-Vienne.
Altered form of French   Lamothe  .

variants.name: McClammy
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from a pet form of   Lamont  .

variants.name: McClymont
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Laomuinn ‘son of Laomann’, a personal name borrowed from Old Norse and meaning ‘law giver’. See Lamont .

variants.name: Lemond
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .
French: variant of Lemonde, a nickname from Old French monde ‘pure’, with fused masculine definite article le.
French (Lémond): variant of Laymond, itself a variant, with fused definite article l', of Aymond .

variants.name: Lemont
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .
French: habitational name from Le Mont in the Vosges or possibly other minor places so named from Old French mont ‘mountain’. Alternatively, a variant of Lemond 2.

variants.name: Lemonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Lamont , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: Lawman
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lamont  .

English: occupational name from Middle English lagman, lagheman ‘law-man, one whose duty is to declare the law; lawyer’ (Old Norse lagmann-, lǫgmann-, oblique case of lǫgmathr). The word was also widely used as a personal name, Middle English Lagman, Lagheman.

variants.name: Lamond
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and French: variant of   Lamont  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Lamothe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Donat, Francois, Lucien, Odette, Adrien, Andree, Armand, Armande.
French: variant of   Lamotte  , or a habitational name from any of the places in France named Lamothe or La Mothe.

History: The settlement that became the city of Detroit was founded in 1701 by Antoine de la Mothe, Sieur de Cadillac (1658–1730), governor of LA. He was born into the minor nobility in Gascony, France, where his father owned the seigneury of Cadillac.

variants.name: Lamonte
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
Chinese:
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont was born about 1381, in Scotland, his father, Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont, was 52 and his mother, Christina Munn, was 48. He married Anne MacDonald in 1397, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1433, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont est né environ 1381, à Écosse, son père, Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Christina Munn, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Anne MacDonald en 1397, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé environ 1433, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont um 1381 in Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont 52 und seine Mutter Christina Munn 48. Er hat 1397 in Scotland Anne MacDonald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1433 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont è nato il circa 1381 nel Scotland, il suo padre, Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Christina Munn, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Anne MacDonald nel 1397, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1433, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamontが約1381年にスコットランドで生まれた時，父Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamontは52歳，母Christina Munnは48歳であった。1397年にスコットランドでAnne MacDonaldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1433年に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont(이)가 대략 1381년 스컷랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Christina Munn(은)는 48세였다. 그는 1397년 스컷랜드에서 Anne MacDonald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1433년 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont nasceu aproximadamente 1381, em Scotland, seu pai, Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Christina Munn, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne MacDonald em 1397, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1433, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Lamont of Inneryne 5th Chief of Clan Lamont родился около 1381 г. в местности Шотландия, его отцу по имени Duncan Lamont 4th Chief of Clan Lamont было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Christina Munn, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne MacDonald в 1397 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер около 1433 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

Se casó con Anne MacDonald en 1397, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1433, a la edad de 54 años.
